# Microsoft Graph API Changelog

## Latest Entries (February 2026)

### February 23, 2026 - Permission Changes (v1.0)
- FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All — Updated delegated permission: no longer requires admin consent
- FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All — Updated delegated permission: no longer requires admin consent
- ThreatSubmission.Read — Updated delegated permission: now requires admin consent
- ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite — Updated delegated permission: now requires admin consent

No March 2026 entries found.

Updated: 2026-03-27
